items.name: Identification Card (ID)
items.description: Military ID card. Must be present at all times.
items.whyNeeded: Required for all in-processing paperwork and identity verification throughout selection.

items.name: ID Tags (Dog Tags) with Breakaway Chain
items.description: Military dog tags with breakaway chain. Medical alert tags or bracelet if required.
items.notes: Medical Alert Tags or Bracelet if required.
items.whyNeeded: Mandatory identification worn at all times during field operations.

items.name: Duffel Bag
items.description: Green or brown military duffel bag from clothing and sales/CIF only. No suitcases, no roller bags.
items.notes: Clothing and sales/CIF issue only. No suitcases, no roller bags.
items.whyNeeded: All mandatory items and additional authorized items must fit into 2 duffel bags.

items.name: OCP Garrison Uniform (Complete)
items.description: Full OCP uniform with patches, flag, rank, name tape, service, and cover.
items.notes: Must have patches, flag, rank, name tape, service, and cover.
items.whyNeeded: Required garrison uniform for in-processing and formal events.

items.name: CAP, OCP, Multicam
items.description: OCP/Multicam patrol cap. No rank, branch insignia, cat eyes, or other badges authorized.
items.notes: No rank, branch insignia, cat eyes, or other badges authorized.

items.name: Trousers, OCP, Multicam
items.description: OCP/Multicam trousers. Jungle or desert uniforms are NOT authorized.
items.notes: Jungle or desert uniforms are NOT authorized. Bring as many pairs as needed.
items.selectionTips: Bring enough pairs for the duration. See Note 1 on packing list.

items.name: Coat, OCP, Multicam
items.description: OCP/Multicam jacket. Jungle or desert uniforms are NOT authorized.
items.notes: Jungle or desert uniforms are NOT authorized. See Note 1 on packing list.
items.selectionTips: Bring enough for the duration. No crye or combat uniforms with knee pad slots or additional pockets.

items.name: Boots
items.description: All boots must comply with AR 670-1. No GORE-TEX, no Temperate Weather boots, no buckles.
items.notes: No GORE-TEX, no Temperate Weather boots, no buckles. Bring multiple pairs.
items.whyNeeded: Foot health is critical to making it through SFAS. Blisters can end your selection.
items.selectionTips: Break in all pairs 6+ months prior. Have at least 2 pairs — one for rucking, one for running. GORE-TEX and temperate weather boots are prohibited.

items.name: Drawers, Cold Weather — Level 1 Bottoms
items.description: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III, level-1-bottoms.
items.notes: Military issue only — Poly-Pro or Gen III.
items.whyNeeded: Winter items are mandatory for all classes. Cold weather layer system is required.

items.name: Drawers, Cold Weather — Level 2 Bottoms
items.description: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III, level-2-bottoms.
items.notes: Military issue only — Poly-Pro or Gen III.
items.whyNeeded: Winter items are mandatory for all classes.

items.name: Undershirt, Cold Weather — Level 1 Tops
items.description: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III, level-1-tops.
items.notes: Military issue only — Poly-Pro or Gen III.
items.whyNeeded: Winter items are mandatory for all classes.

items.name: Undershirt, Cold Weather — Level 2 Tops
items.description: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III, level-2-tops.
items.notes: Military issue only — Poly-Pro or Gen III.
items.whyNeeded: Winter items are mandatory for all classes.

items.name: Gloves, Cold Weather (Leather with Inserts)
items.description: Leather gloves with inserts only. No GORE-TEX, no O.R. gloves.
items.notes: LEATHER GLOVES WITH INSERTS ONLY. NO GORE-TEX, O.R. GLOVES ETC.
items.whyNeeded: Winter items mandatory for all classes. Wet/cold conditions are common at Camp Mackall.

items.name: Gloves, Light Duty Work Type
items.description: Light duty work gloves. No GORE-TEX, subdued/military colors only. Civilian gloves authorized.
items.notes: No GORE-TEX. Subdued/military colors only. Civilian gloves authorized.

items.name: Watch Cap, Military Issue Micro Fleece
items.description: Military issue Micro Fleece watch cap, military colors only.
items.notes: Military issue Micro Fleece only. Military colors only.
items.whyNeeded: Winter items mandatory for all classes.

items.name: Underwear
items.description: Military color only, non-compression, no spandex. MUST BE COTTON ONLY.
items.notes: Military color only, non-compression, no spandex. MUST BE COTTON ONLY. Bring as many as needed.
items.selectionTips: Spandex and compression underwear are prohibited. Cotton only.

items.name: Eyeglasses with Retainer Bands
items.description: If required. NO TINT, NO TRANSITION LENSES. Military issued if required.
items.notes: NO TINT, NO TRANSITION LENSES. Military issued if required.

items.name: Eye Protection APEL (Clear Lens)
items.description: Clear lens only. Inserts if required.
items.notes: Clear Lens only. With inserts if required.
items.whyNeeded: Required for range events and field operations.
items.selectionTips: Clear lens only. No tinted lenses.

items.name: PT Uniform (Complete Set)
items.description: Jacket, Pants, Long Sleeve Shirt, Short Sleeve Shirt, and Shorts. Must be complete.
items.notes: Must include: Jacket, Pants, Long Sleeve Shirt, Short Sleeve Shirt, Shorts.
items.whyNeeded: Required for physical training events.

items.name: Running Shoes
items.description: Running shoes for PT events.
items.whyNeeded: Required for physical training and running events.
items.selectionTips: Break them in before arriving. Have a tested and proven pair.

items.name: Athletic Socks
items.description: Socks for PT and running shoes.
items.notes: Bring as many pairs as needed.

items.name: Belt, Tan Non-Elastic
items.description: Tan non-elastic belt. Rigger belts are accepted.
items.notes: Rigger belts accepted.

items.name: T-Shirts, Short Sleeve
items.description: Sterile tan or OCP brown. Must be 100% cotton only. No cotton/polyester mixes.
items.notes: Sterile tan or OCP brown. 100% cotton only. No cotton/polyester mixes. Bring as many as needed.
items.selectionTips: 100% cotton only. Under Armour and other athletic shirts are not authorized.

items.name: Boot Socks
items.description: Military colors only. No sock liners, no GORE-TEX, no waterproof socks, no toe socks.
items.notes: Military colors only. No sock liners, no GORE-TEX, no waterproof socks, no toe socks. Bring as many as needed.
items.selectionTips: Wool or wool-blend socks in military colors. Bring extra pairs.

items.name: Hydration System — CamelBak 70–100oz
items.description: CamelBak or similar hydration carrier, 70–100 oz capacity. Carrier will not have clips or carabiners attached.
items.notes: Carrier will not have clips or carabiners attached.
items.whyNeeded: Hydration is critical during long ruck marches and field events.
items.selectionTips: 70–100 oz only. Remove any clips or carabiners from the carrier.

items.name: Headlamp
items.description: Red/white lens capable. Must require AA or AAA batteries.
items.notes: Must require AA or AAA batteries. Must have red and white lens capability.
items.whyNeeded: Night operations and early morning movement require a headlamp with red light capability.
items.selectionTips: Get one that runs on AA or AAA only — no rechargeable-only models.

items.name: Batteries, AA and/or AAA
items.description: Extra batteries for headlamp. Bring as many as needed.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed for headlamp.
items.selectionTips: Bring a generous supply. Cold weather drains batteries faster.

items.name: Pens
items.description: Writing pens.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Pencils
items.description: Writing pencils.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Notebook
items.description: Not larger than 4"x6". Sterile upon arrival — it will be thrown away at the end of the course.
items.notes: NOT larger than 4x6 inches. Must be sterile (blank) upon arrival. Will be discarded at course end.
items.whyNeeded: Used to take notes during instruction.
items.selectionTips: Keep it sterile/blank. No pre-written notes. No personal land navigation notes.

items.name: Razor, Shaving (Non-Electric)
items.description: Non-electric shaving razor.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed. Electric razor authorized for religious or shaving profiles only.
items.whyNeeded: Grooming standards must be maintained throughout selection.

items.name: Razor Blades
items.description: Replacement blades for shaving razor.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Shaving Cream
items.description: Standard shaving cream.

items.name: Sewing Kit, Military Issue
items.description: Standard military issue sewing kit.
items.whyNeeded: Used to repair uniform and gear during the course.

items.name: Shower Shoes
items.description: Flip-flops only. No heel straps. Any color.
items.notes: Flip-flops only. No heel straps.
items.whyNeeded: Required for field hygiene facilities.

items.name: Shower Soap
items.description: Bar or body wash for showering.

items.name: Toothbrush
items.description: Standard toothbrush.

items.name: Toothpaste (Large Tube)
items.description: Standard toothpaste, large tube.

items.name: Shampoo (Large Bottle)
items.description: Standard shampoo, large bottle.

items.name: Towels, Large
items.description: Large towels in military/subdued colors.
items.notes: Military/subdued colors only.

items.name: Laundry Soap, Liquid
items.description: Small or medium bottle. No Powder/Pods.
items.notes: Small/Medium Bottle only. No Powder/Pods.
items.whyNeeded: Hand-washing of clothing may be required during extended field periods.

items.name: Wristwatch
items.description: Basic wristwatch with regular time, world time, alarm, timer, and stopwatch only. No GPS, altimeter, pedometer, compass, or internet capability.
items.notes: NO GPS, altimeter, pedometer, compass, or internet capability. Allowed functions: regular time, world time, alarm, timer, stopwatch only.
items.whyNeeded: Time management is critical during events. Two watches in case one fails.
items.selectionTips: Simple Casio G-Shock or similar. No smart features whatsoever.

items.name: Laundry Bag, Army Issue
items.description: Army issue laundry bag. Green or black from clothing and sales.
items.notes: Green or black from clothing and sales only.

items.name: Deodorant
items.description: Standard deodorant.

items.name: Hygiene Kit Bag, Small
items.description: Small military-style hygiene/toiletry bag.
items.whyNeeded: Keeps hygiene items organized and accessible.

items.name: Cash
items.description: At least $75 but no more than $100. Cash only.
items.notes: At least $75 but no more than $100.
items.whyNeeded: Required for any incidentals or emergency needs during selection.
items.selectionTips: Bring exactly between $75–$100. Amounts outside this range are not authorized.

items.name: Copies of Orders (5 copies)
items.description: Five copies of orders. Also bring: 2 copies of SFAS physical, 1 copy ERB/ORB/Soldier Talent Profile with ASVAB scores, DLAB if applicable, EPSQ hardcopy.
items.notes: Also required: (2) copies of SFAS physical, (1) copy ERB/ORB/STP with ASVAB scores, DLAB/TABE if applicable, EPSQ hardcopy. Marine personnel bring copy of Master Brief Sheet. Air Force personnel bring Career Data Brief. Navy personnel bring Member Data Summary.
items.whyNeeded: Required for in-processing and administrative purposes.
items.selectionTips: Print all documents before arriving. Have extras in case pages are lost.

items.name: Jacket, Cold Weather (Fleece)
items.description: Military issue cold weather fleece jacket.
items.notes: Candidates will have all TA-50 items whether issued at Fort Bragg CIF or not.
items.whyNeeded: Winter items are mandatory for all SFAS classes.

items.name: Wet Weather Top and Bottom (GORE-TEX or Non-GORE-TEX)
items.description: Cold weather waterproof wet weather gear — top and bottom set.
items.notes: GORE-TEX or NON-GORE-TEX both authorized for wet weather top/bottom.
items.whyNeeded: Required for wet and cold weather operations. Mandatory for all classes.

items.name: Gloves, Leather (White, Tan, or Black Only)
items.description: Military issue leather gloves. White, tan, or black only.
items.notes: White, Tan, or Black only.

items.name: Fighting Load Carrier (FLC) or TAPS System
items.description: Carrier, Fighting Load (FLC) OR TAPS SYSTEMS.

items.name: Canteen Pouch, 1 QT
items.description: One-quart canteen pouch.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Frame Pack
items.description: Pack, Frame MOLLE (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.
items.whyNeeded: The MOLLE ruck is the primary load-bearing system for SFAS ruck marches.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Molded Waist Belt
items.description: Belt, Molded Waist (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Shoulder Straps
items.description: Shoulder Straps (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Patrol Pack (Large)
items.description: Pack, Patrol Large (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Load Lifter Attachment Straps
items.description: Load Lifter Attachment Straps (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.

items.name: Clothing Bag, Waterproof
items.description: Green Army issued waterproof clothing bag with black inside.
items.notes: GREEN ARMY ISSUED WITH BLACK INSIDE.
items.whyNeeded: Keeps clothing dry during wet weather operations.

items.name: Poncho, Wet Weather
items.description: Military issue wet weather poncho.
items.whyNeeded: Protection from rain during field operations.

items.name: Poncho Liner (Woobie)
items.description: Liner, Wet Weather Poncho.
items.whyNeeded: Provides warmth when used with poncho as a sleep system.

items.name: Canteen, 2 QT
items.description: Two-quart military canteen.

items.name: Canteen, 1 QT
items.description: One-quart military canteen.

items.name: Canteen Cover, 2 QT
items.description: Cover for two-quart canteen.

items.name: Canteen Cup
items.description: Military issue canteen cup.

items.name: Entrenching Tool and Cover
items.description: Military issue e-tool (folding shovel) with carrier/cover.
items.whyNeeded: Required for field operations.

items.name: Sleeping Bag System (Summer + Winter + Bivy Cover)
items.description: Complete sleeping bag system. Summer bag, winter bag, and bivy cover are ALL mandatory for all classes.
items.notes: ALL THREE components mandatory for ALL classes: Summer bag, Winter bag, and Bivy Cover. See Note 4 — winter items mandatory regardless of season.
items.whyNeeded: Sleep system must cover all temperature ranges. All three components are required regardless of class date.
items.selectionTips: If issued a new brown sleeping bag at CIF, you will only have one sleeping bag and one stuff sack. See Note 4.

items.name: Stuff Sack, Small
items.description: Small stuff sack (component of sleeping bag system). See Note 4.
items.notes: See Note 4 on packing list regarding sleeping bag/stuff sack requirements.

items.name: Stuff Sack, Large
items.description: Large stuff sack (component of sleeping bag system). See Note 4.
items.notes: See Note 4 on packing list regarding sleeping bag/stuff sack requirements.

items.name: Sleeping Mat
items.description: Military issue sleeping mat.
items.whyNeeded: Insulation from the ground during field sleep.

items.name: Poncho, Wet Weather (Extra)
items.description: Additional wet weather poncho.

items.name: Alcohol Markers
items.description: Alcohol-based markers.

items.name: Alcohol Eraser
items.description: Eraser for alcohol markers.

items.name: Black Tape (Friction or Electrical)
items.description: Black friction or electrical tape.

items.name: Nail Clippers
items.description: Finger and/or toe nail clippers.

items.name: Foot Powder, Non-Aerosol
items.description: Non-aerosol foot powder for blister and fungus prevention.
items.notes: Non-aerosol only.
items.whyNeeded: Helps prevent blisters and trench foot during extended ruck marches.

items.name: Large Trash Bags
items.description: Large heavy-duty trash bags.
items.notes: One box.

items.name: Lip Balm
items.description: Lip balm/chapstick.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Knife or Multi-Tool
items.description: ONLY one or the other. Folding blade 4 inches or less.
items.notes: ONLY a knife OR a multi-tool — not both. Folding blade 4 inches or less.
items.selectionTips: Bring one or the other, not both.

items.name: Sunscreen, Non-Aerosol
items.description: Non-aerosol sunscreen.
items.notes: Non-aerosol only.

items.name: Waterproof Bags (Zip Lock)
items.description: Zip lock bags, no larger than gallon-size.
items.notes: No larger than gallon-size. One box.
items.whyNeeded: Keeps documents and small items dry.

items.name: Baby Wipes (Alcohol Free)
items.description: Alcohol free and without additives.
items.notes: Alcohol free and without additives. Bring as many as needed.
items.whyNeeded: Field hygiene when shower access is limited.

items.name: Hand Sanitizer
items.description: Standard hand sanitizer.

items.name: Insect Repellant, Non-Aerosol
items.description: Non-aerosol insect repellant.
items.notes: Non-aerosol only. Bring as many as needed.
items.whyNeeded: Camp Mackall area has heavy insect activity, especially in warmer months.

items.name: Boot Insoles
items.description: Replacement insoles for boots. Any type.
items.notes: Any type authorized. Bring as many as needed.
items.whyNeeded: Reduces foot fatigue and blisters during long ruck marches.

items.name: Lighter
items.description: Standard disposable lighter.

items.name: Liner, Field Jacket
items.description: Field jacket liner.

items.name: Map Case
items.description: Clear map case/protractor case.

items.name: Moleskin
items.description: Moleskin padding for blister prevention.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.
items.whyNeeded: Applied to hot spots before blisters form.

items.name: Pace Cord
items.description: 100-meter pace count cord (ranger beads).

items.name: Q-Tips
items.description: Cotton swabs.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Shower Soap Applicator
items.description: Loofah or washcloth.
items.notes: Loofah or washcloth.

items.name: Skin Care Lotion (Small)
items.description: Small bottle of skin care lotion.

items.name: Dental Retainer
items.description: Orthodontic dental retainer if applicable.

items.name: Dental Floss
items.description: Standard dental floss.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: 100 MPH Tape
items.description: Tan or OD Green 100 MPH tape.
items.notes: Tan or OD Green only.
items.whyNeeded: General field repair and gear reinforcement.

items.name: 550 Paracord
items.description: Nylon 550-type cord, military or subdued colors. 100 feet.
items.notes: Military or subdued colors only. 100 feet.

items.name: Extra Bite Valve & Bladder for Hydration System
items.description: Spare bite valve and bladder for CamelBak.
items.whyNeeded: Bite valves can fail. Having a spare prevents dehydration.

items.name: Bootlaces
items.description: Spare bootlaces.
items.notes: Two pairs.

items.name: Book
items.description: Bible, Ranger Handbook, or novel. No magazines.
items.notes: Bible, Ranger Handbook, or novel ONLY. No magazines.

items.name: Clothes Pins
items.description: Standard clothes pins for drying wet gear.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Physical Therapy Item (Non-Electric)
items.description: Foam roller, rolling stick, or similar non-electric recovery tool. One item only.
items.notes: Non-electric only. One item maximum (foam roller OR rolling stick).
items.whyNeeded: Recovery tool for muscle soreness during long training blocks.

items.name: Safety Pins
items.description: Standard safety pins.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Combination Lock
items.description: Combination lock. No key locks.
items.notes: NO KEY LOCKS. Combination only.

items.name: Anti-Chafe (Body Glide or Vaseline)
items.description: Anti-chafing product such as Body Glide or Vaseline.
items.whyNeeded: Prevents chafing and skin breakdown during extended ruck marches.

items.name: Highlighter Markers
items.description: Standard highlighter markers.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Bungee Cords (Tactical Colors)
items.description: Bungee cords in tactical/subdued colors only.
items.notes: Tactical colors only. Bring as many as needed.

items.name: 2-Quart Canteen Straws
items.description: Drinking straws for 2-quart canteen.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Scrub Brush (to clean TA-50)
items.description: Scrub brush for cleaning TA-50 equipment.
items.whyNeeded: TA-50 must be cleaned and serviceable.

items.name: Tent Stakes, Camping (Black Only)
items.description: Black camping tent stakes. All other colors are unauthorized.
items.notes: Black only. All other colors are unauthorized. Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Bed Sheets / Pillow
items.description: Bed sheets and pillow. No civilian sleeping bags.
items.notes: NO CIVILIAN SLEEPING BAGS.

items.name: Ranger Shorts
items.description: Military/subdued colors only. No logos.
items.notes: Military/subdued colors only. No logos. Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Facemask / Balaclava (Army Issue)
items.description: Army issue facemask or balaclava.
items.notes: Army Issue only.
items.whyNeeded: Cold weather face protection.

items.name: Neck Gaiter
items.description: Neck gaiter for cold weather.

items.name: Feminine Hygiene Wipes / Baby Wipes (Female Candidates)
items.description: Feminine wipes or additional baby wipes. 2 per day recommended. FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY.
items.notes: FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. 40 total (2 per day).

items.name: Bra, No Underwire (Female Candidates)
items.description: Sports or training bra. No underwire, no clasps, no hooks. FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY.
items.notes: FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. No underwire, No clasps, No Hooks.

items.name: Drawers, Cotton (Female Candidates)
items.description: Cotton underwear. FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY.
items.notes: FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. Bring as many as needed.

items.name: Pads / Tampons (Female Candidates)
items.description: One month supply. FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY.
items.notes: FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. One Month Supply.

items.name: Female Urinary Diversion Device / FUDD (Female Candidates)
items.description: Female urinary diversion device. FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY.
items.notes: FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY.

items.name: Cellular Phone / Electronic Items
items.description: Cell phones and all electronic items will be turned in and locked up during initial layout.
items.notes: These will be turned in and locked up during the initial layout.

items.name: Any Product Containing Caffeine
items.description: Caffeine products of any kind are prohibited.

items.name: Tobacco Products
items.description: Tobacco products of any type are prohibited.

items.name: Civilian Long Underwear
items.description: Only military issue cold weather base layers are authorized.
items.notes: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III only.

items.name: Contact Lenses
items.description: Contact lenses are prohibited.
items.notes: Wear eyeglasses with retainer bands instead.

items.name: Modified Shoulder Straps or Kidney Pads
items.description: Non-standard or modified rucksack shoulder straps and kidney pads are prohibited.

items.name: Spandex / Athletic Underwear / Tight Fitting Under Armour
items.description: Spandex, compression athletic wear, and tight fitting undergarments are prohibited.
items.notes: Includes: tight fitting Under Armour, spandex shorts/leggings, compression gear.

items.name: Supplements, Vitamins, or Energy Products
items.description: All supplements, vitamins, and energy products of any type are prohibited.

items.name: GORE-TEX or Temperate Weather Boots and Socks
items.description: GORE-TEX boots, temperate weather boots, and GORE-TEX socks are prohibited.
items.notes: Boots must comply with AR 670-1. No GORE-TEX, no Temperate Weather boots.

items.name: Civilian Medications (Aspirin, Tylenol, etc.)
items.description: Over-the-counter civilian medications are prohibited.
items.notes: Includes aspirin, Tylenol, ibuprofen, and similar OTC medications.

items.name: Modified or Non-Standard TA-50
items.description: Only approved TA-50 items from the authorized list are permitted.
items.notes: See approved TA-50 list.

items.name: Kinesiology Tape
items.description: Kinesiology tape (e.g., KT Tape) is prohibited.

items.name: Medical Tape, Band Aids, Wraps, or Braces
items.description: Medical tape, bandages, wraps, and braces of any kind are prohibited.

items.name: Chem Lights, Glint/Reflective Tape, or PT Belts
items.description: Chemical lights, glint tape, reflective tape, and PT belts are prohibited.

items.name: Personal Land Navigation Items, Tools, or Notes
items.description: Personal land navigation equipment, tools, and pre-written navigation notes are prohibited.
items.notes: Notebooks must be sterile (blank) upon arrival.
